# Agent Trust Handshake Protocol

## Docs

- [What is ATH?](https://athprotocol.dev/docs/getting-started/intro.md): An open protocol for establishing trusted connections between AI agents and external services
- [Quickstart](https://athprotocol.dev/docs/getting-started/quickstart.md): Get up and running with ATH in 5 minutes
- [Architecture](https://athprotocol.dev/docs/learn/architecture.md): Overview of ATH deployment models and system architecture
- [Agent Identity](https://athprotocol.dev/docs/learn/identity.md): How ATH identifies and verifies AI agents
- [Discovery](https://athprotocol.dev/docs/learn/discovery.md): How agents discover ATH-compatible services and gateways
- [Trusted Handshake](https://athprotocol.dev/docs/learn/trusted-handshake.md): The core security mechanism requiring both app-side and user-side authorization
- [Scope Intersection](https://athprotocol.dev/docs/learn/scope-intersection.md): How ATH computes effective permissions
- [Adoption Levels](https://athprotocol.dev/docs/learn/adoption-levels.md): Incremental adoption from gateway mode to native implementation
- [Versioning](https://athprotocol.dev/docs/learn/versioning.md): How ATH protocol versions work
- [Deploy a Gateway](https://athprotocol.dev/docs/develop/build-gateway.md): Set up an ATH Gateway to protect services
- [Build an Agent](https://athprotocol.dev/docs/develop/build-agent.md): Use the ATH Client SDK to connect your agent
- [SDKs](https://athprotocol.dev/docs/develop/sdk.md): Official SDKs for building with ATH
- [Security Best Practices](https://athprotocol.dev/docs/tutorials/security/best-practices.md): Security considerations for ATH implementations
- [Audit Logging](https://athprotocol.dev/docs/tutorials/security/audit-logging.md): How to implement audit logging
- [Example: Travel Agent](https://athprotocol.dev/docs/examples/scenario.md): Complete walkthrough of the trusted handshake

## Specification

- [Specification v0.1](https://athprotocol.dev/specification/0.1/index.md): ATH Protocol Specification v0.1
- [Changelog](https://athprotocol.dev/specification/0.1/changelog.md): Changes in ATH Protocol Specification v0.1
- [Protocol Overview](https://athprotocol.dev/specification/0.1/basic/overview.md): Design principles and architecture
- [Identity Model](https://athprotocol.dev/specification/0.1/basic/identity.md): Agent and service identity specification
- [Discovery](https://athprotocol.dev/specification/0.1/basic/discovery.md): Service and gateway discovery specification
- [Handshake Flow](https://athprotocol.dev/specification/0.1/basic/handshake-flow.md): The two-phase trusted handshake protocol
- [Scope Intersection](https://athprotocol.dev/specification/0.1/basic/scope-intersection.md): Formal scope intersection specification
- [Security](https://athprotocol.dev/specification/0.1/basic/security.md): Security requirements and considerations
- [Agent Registration](https://athprotocol.dev/specification/0.1/server/registration.md): POST /ath/agents/register
- [Authorization](https://athprotocol.dev/specification/0.1/server/authorization.md): POST /ath/authorize
- [Token Exchange](https://athprotocol.dev/specification/0.1/server/token.md): POST /ath/token
- [API Proxy](https://athprotocol.dev/specification/0.1/server/proxy.md): ANY /ath/proxy/{provider_id}/{path}
- [Token Revocation](https://athprotocol.dev/specification/0.1/server/revocation.md): POST /ath/revoke
- [Schema Reference](https://athprotocol.dev/specification/0.1/schema.md): Type definitions for ATH protocol objects
- [OpenAPI Spec](https://athprotocol.dev/specification/0.1/openapi.md): OpenAPI 3.1 specification

## Community

- [Contributing](https://athprotocol.dev/community/contributing.md): How to contribute to ATH
- [Roadmap](https://athprotocol.dev/community/roadmap.md): The ATH protocol development roadmap
- [Comparison](https://athprotocol.dev/community/comparison.md): How ATH relates to OAuth, MCP, and A2A
- [Glossary](https://athprotocol.dev/community/glossary.md): Key terms used in the ATH protocol

## Optional

- [TypeScript SDK](https://github.com/agenttrusthandshake/typescript-sdk)
- [Reference Gateway](https://github.com/agenttrusthandshake/gateway)
